_doc: Cross-platform golden samples for the lowercase-hex SHA-256 of a UTF-8 string (audit C4 / D3c). This is the domain routing-key hash used by the fallback fetch path. One runner per language asserts its implementation against this single file: JS sha256Hex (src/utils/domain-suffix.ts), Kotlin sha256Hex (android .../helper/ConfigFetcher.kt) and Swift sha256HexString (ios/core/Sha256.swift). SHA-256 is a standard algorithm, so all correct implementations agree exactly — this locks the UTF-8 encoding and lowercase-hex formatting so a subtle change (encoding, casing, truncation) on any one platform is caught.
